attributes.description: Cluster listing with resource utilization, and node/pod counts.

embeddableConfig.description:
Summary per cluster. 

Click a cluster name to drill down. 

Health is based on node readiness. 

CPU and memory utilization are averaged over the selected time range. 

Node, namespace, pod counts and disk utilization reflect the latest values.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS namespaces = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.namespace.name), pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.pod.uid) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    node_ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, CASE(k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    cpu_usage  = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws     = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage   = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap     = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    namespaces = MAX(namespaces),
    pods       = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    cpu_pct  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 2),
    mem_pct  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| STATS
    healthy_pct = AVG(node_ready),
    nodes       = COUNT(*),
    cpu_util    = AVG(cpu_pct),
    mem_util    = AVG(mem_pct),
    disk_util   = AVG(disk_pct),
    namespaces  = MAX(namespaces),
    pods        = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| SORT healthy_pct ASC, cpu_util DESC

FROM metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS namespaces = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.namespace.name), pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.pod.uid) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    node_ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, CASE(k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    cpu_usage  = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws     = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage   = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap     = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    namespaces = MAX(namespaces),
    pods       = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    cpu_pct  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 2),
    mem_pct  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| STATS
    healthy_pct = AVG(node_ready),
    nodes       = COUNT(*),
    cpu_util    = AVG(cpu_pct),
    mem_util    = AVG(mem_pct),
    disk_util   = AVG(disk_pct),
    namespaces  = MAX(namespaces),
    pods        = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| SORT healthy_pct ASC, cpu_util DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Summary per cluster. Click a cluster name to drill down. Health is based on node readiness. CPU and memory utilization are averaged over the selected time range. Node, namespace, pod counts and disk utilization reflect the latest values.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT(*),
    ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| EVAL is_healthy = CASE(ready_nodes == total_nodes, 1, 0)
| STATS healthy_count = SUM(is_healthy)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT(*),
    ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| EVAL is_healthy = CASE(ready_nodes == total_nodes, 1, 0)
| STATS healthy_count = SUM(is_healthy)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of clusters where every node is Ready, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range. A cluster counts as healthy only when ready nodes equal total nodes.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT(*),
    ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| EVAL is_unhealthy = CASE(ready_nodes < total_nodes, 1, 0)
| STATS unhealthy_count = SUM(is_unhealthy)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT(*),
    ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| EVAL is_unhealthy = CASE(ready_nodes < total_nodes, 1, 0)
| STATS unhealthy_count = SUM(is_unhealthy)

embeddableConfig.description:
Number of clusters with at least one node that is not Ready, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range. 

A cluster counts as unhealthy when ready nodes are fewer than total nodes.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS total_clusters = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS total_clusters = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of clusters being monitored, based on distinct cluster names seen in the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS node_ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT(*),
    ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE node_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp
| EVAL is_healthy = CASE(ready_nodes == total_nodes AND total_nodes > 0, 1, 0)
| STATS
    total_clusters = COUNT(*),
    healthy_clusters = SUM(is_healthy),
    unhealthy_clusters = SUM(CASE(is_healthy == 0, 1, 0))
  BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS node_ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT(*),
    ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE node_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp
| EVAL is_healthy = CASE(ready_nodes == total_nodes AND total_nodes > 0, 1, 0)
| STATS
    total_clusters = COUNT(*),
    healthy_clusters = SUM(is_healthy),
    unhealthy_clusters = SUM(CASE(is_healthy == 0, 1, 0))
  BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

embeddableConfig.description: Cluster health over time: total, healthy, and unhealthy cluster counts per time bucket
embeddableConfig.title: Cluster counts over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    mem_ws    = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_pct = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), NULL)
| STATS mem_util = AVG(mem_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, mem_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    mem_ws    = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_pct = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), NULL)
| STATS mem_util = AVG(mem_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, mem_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Average memory utilization over time for the 10 clusters with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by memory working set utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| STATS cpu_util = AVG(cpu_util)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, cpu_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| STATS cpu_util = AVG(cpu_util)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, cpu_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Average CPU utilization over time for the 10 clusters with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by CPU utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    desired = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired),
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.namespace.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS pod_delta = SUM(desired) - SUM(available)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| WHERE pod_delta > 0
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket, pod_delta
| SORT time_bucket ASC, pod_delta DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    desired = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired),
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.namespace.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS pod_delta = SUM(desired) - SUM(available)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| WHERE pod_delta > 0
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket, pod_delta
| SORT time_bucket ASC, pod_delta DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket

embeddableConfig.description: Gap between desired and available replicas across all deployments per cluster. Positive value = under-provisioned.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by desired vs actual pods delta

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid,
     time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT(*),
    running_pods = COUNT(*) WHERE phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| WHERE non_running_pods > 0
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket, non_running_pods
| SORT time_bucket ASC, non_running_pods DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid,
     time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT(*),
    running_pods = COUNT(*) WHERE phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| WHERE non_running_pods > 0
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket, non_running_pods
| SORT time_bucket ASC, non_running_pods DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket

embeddableConfig.description: Number of unhealthy pods per cluster: total unique pods minus pods in Running phase (phase=2).
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by non-running pods

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap   = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL disk_pct = CASE(fs_cap > 0, TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), NULL)
| STATS disk_util = AVG(disk_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, disk_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap   = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL disk_pct = CASE(fs_cap > 0, TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), NULL)
| STATS disk_util = AVG(disk_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, disk_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Average disk utilization over time for the 10 clusters with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by disk utilization

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Clusters
